summary: Monte Carlo simulation results for CI stock over ~8 trading days. Bootstrap: 58.6%, Normal: 58.8%, Blended: 55.4%, Zero-drift: 49.8%. Strong Q4 2025 earnings reported Feb 5. Recent price: 291.44.
content: CI reported strong Q4/FY2025 earnings on Feb 5, 2026. Revenue up 11% to $274.9B. Positive 2026 outlook with adjusted EPS of at least $30.25. Stock jumped from ~271 to ~292 post-earnings. Recent volatility ~30% annualized. 8 trading days from Feb 17 to Feb 27 (Feb 28 is Saturday). Monte Carlo gives 54-59% probability of being higher.
